controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable from march 01, 2026
controls.control_description: These Directions shall be applicable from March 01, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable from march 01, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure 03, 2000) and foreign exchange management (debt instruments) regulations, 2019 (notification no
controls.control_description:
FEMA 1/2000-RB dated
May 03, 2000) and Foreign Exchange Management (Debt Instruments) Regulations,
2019 (Notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 03, 2000) and foreign exchange management (debt instruments) regulations, 2019 (notification no

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (rupee interest rate derivatives) directions, 2025 (hereinafter, the directions)
controls.control_description:
1.1 These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Rupee Interest Rate Derivatives) Directions, 2025 (hereinafter, the Directions).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (rupee interest rate derivatives) directions, 2025 (hereinafter, the directions)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rupee interest rate derivatives (ird) transactions undertaken in the over-the-counter (otc) market and on recognised stock exchanges
controls.control_description:
1.2 These Directions shall be applicable to Rupee interest rate derivatives (IRD)
transactions undertaken in the over-the-counter (OTC) market and on recognised
stock exchanges in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rupee interest rate derivatives (ird) transactions undertaken in the over-the-counter (otc) market and on recognised stock exchanges

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken in the otc market in terms of the reserve bank of india (forward contracts in government securities) directions, 2025, dated february 21
controls.control_description:
Provided that Forward Contracts in Government Securities shall be undertaken in
the OTC market in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Forward Contracts in
Government Securities) Directions, 2025, dated February 21, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken in the otc market in terms of the reserve bank of india (forward contracts in government securities) directions, 2025, dated february 21

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force from march 01, 2026
controls.control_description: 1.3 These Directions shall come into force from March 01, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force from march 01, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure an arrangement under which an overseas entity (including overseas branches
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Back-to-back arrangement' means an arrangement under which an overseas
entity (including overseas branches, IFSC Banking Units (IBUs), wholly owned
subsidiaries or joint ventures of market-makers) undertakes a transaction with a
non-resident and immediately enters into an off-setting transaction with the
market-maker in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an arrangement under which an overseas entity (including overseas branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through any branch of the parent bank
controls.control_description:
In the case of foreign banks operating in India, the back-
to-back arrangement may be through any branch of the parent bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through any branch of the parent bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure an interest rate administered by a financial benchmark administrator
controls.control_description:
(ii) 'Benchmark Interest Rate' means an interest rate administered by a Financial
Benchmark Administrator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an interest rate administered by a financial benchmark administrator

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2 (20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)
controls.control_description:
(iii) 'Company' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2 (20) of
the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2 (20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 2(a)(ii) of the master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) direction
controls.control_description:
(iv) 'Electronic Trading Platform (ETP)' shall have the same meaning as assigned
to it in paragraph 2(a)(ii) of the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Electronic Trading Platforms) Directions, 2025, dated June 16, 2025, as
amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 2(a)(ii) of the master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) direction

controls.control_objective: To ensure an interest rate call / put option contract that can be exercised only on the expiration date
controls.control_description:
(v) 'European Interest Rate Call / Put Option' means an interest rate call / put
option contract that can be exercised only on the expiration date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an interest rate call / put option contract that can be exercised only on the expiration date

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person who controls the creation, operation and administration of financial benchmark(s) authorised under reserve bank of india (financial benchmark
controls.control_description:
(vi) 'Financial Benchmark Administrator' (FBA) means a person who controls the
creation, operation and administration of financial benchmark(s) authorised
under Reserve Bank of India (Financial Benchmark Administrators) Directions,
2023, dated December 28, 2023, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person who controls the creation, operation and administration of financial benchmark(s) authorised under reserve bank of india (financial benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure a rupee interest rate derivative contract whose settlement currency is a currency other than the indian rupee (inr)
controls.control_description:
(vii) 'Foreign Currency Settled Interest Rate Derivative (FCS-IRD)' means a
Rupee interest rate derivative contract whose settlement currency is a currency
other than the Indian Rupee (INR).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a rupee interest rate derivative contract whose settlement currency is a currency other than the indian rupee (inr)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person registered in accordance with the provisions of the securities and exchange board of india (foreign portfolio investors) regulations, 2019, a
controls.control_description:
(viii) 'Foreign Portfolio Investor (FPI)' means a person registered in accordance
with the provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Foreign
Portfolio Investors) Regulations, 2019, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person registered in accordance with the provisions of the securities and exchange board of india (foreign portfolio investors) regulations, 2019, a

controls.control_objective: To ensure a cash-settled otc derivative contract between two counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on the settlement date, the difference betwee
controls.control_description:
(ix) 'Forward Rate Agreement (FRA)' means a cash-settled OTC derivative
contract between two counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on the
settlement date, the difference between a pre-determined fixed rate (FRA rate)
and a predetermined floating interest rate / price / index, applied on a notional
principal amount, for a specified forward period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a cash-settled otc derivative contract between two counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on the settlement date, the difference betwee

controls.control_objective: To ensure an interest rate option that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy / sell an interest rate instrument or receive / pay an interest
controls.control_description:
(x) 'Interest rate call / put option' means an interest rate option that gives the buyer
the right, but not the obligation, to buy / sell an interest rate instrument or receive
/ pay an interest rate on a notional principal at a pre-determined price/rate on or
before a specified expiration date in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an interest rate option that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy / sell an interest rate instrument or receive / pay an interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure a series of interest rate call options (called caplets) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underly
controls.control_description:
(xi) 'Interest rate cap' means a series of interest rate call options (called caplets) in
which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when
the underlying interest rate is above a rate agreed in advance (strike rate).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a series of interest rate call options (called caplets) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underly

controls.control_objective: To ensure a derivative contract where a market participant simultaneously purchases an interest rate cap and sells an interest rate floor on the same interest r
controls.control_description:
(xii) 'Interest rate collar' means a derivative contract where a market participant
simultaneously purchases an interest rate cap and sells an interest rate floor on
the same interest rate for the same maturity and notional principal amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a derivative contract where a market participant simultaneously purchases an interest rate cap and sells an interest rate floor on the same interest r

controls.control_objective: To ensure a series of interest rate put options in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underlying interest rate
controls.control_description:
(xiii) 'Interest rate floor' means a series of interest rate put options in which the buyer
of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underlying
interest rate is below the strike rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a series of interest rate put options in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underlying interest rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure a standardised interest rate derivative contract, traded on a recognised stock exchange, to buy or sell a notional security or any other interest-bear
controls.control_description:
(xiv) 'Interest rate futures' means a standardised interest rate derivative contract,
traded on a recognised stock exchange, to buy or sell a notional security or any
other interest-bearing instrument or an index of such instruments or interest rates
at a specified future date, at a price determined at the time of the contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a standardised interest rate derivative contract, traded on a recognised stock exchange, to buy or sell a notional security or any other interest-bear

controls.control_objective: To ensure a derivative contract that involves exchange of a stream of agreed interest payments on a `notional principal' amount during a specified period
controls.control_description:
(xv) 'Interest rate swap' means a derivative contract that involves exchange of a
stream of agreed interest payments on a `notional principal' amount during a
specified period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a derivative contract that involves exchange of a stream of agreed interest payments on a `notional principal' amount during a specified period

controls.control_objective: To ensure an option on an interest rate swap(s) which gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to enter into an interest rate swap
controls.control_description:
(xvi) 'Interest rate swaption' means an option on an interest rate swap(s) which
gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to enter into an interest rate swap.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an option on an interest rate swap(s) which gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to enter into an interest rate swap

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006 (38 of 2006)
controls.control_description:
(xvii) 'Government Securities' shall have the same meaning as defined in section
2(f) of the Government Securities Act, 2006 (38 of 2006).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006 (38 of 2006)

controls.control_objective: To ensure the activity of undertaking a derivative transaction to reduce rupee interest rate risk at the balance sheet level or the portfolio level or at indivi
controls.control_description:
(xviii) 'Hedging' means the activity of undertaking a derivative transaction to reduce
Rupee interest rate risk at the balance sheet level or the portfolio level or at
individual asset or liability level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the activity of undertaking a derivative transaction to reduce rupee interest rate risk at the balance sheet level or the portfolio level or at indivi

controls.control_objective: To ensure a financial derivative contract whose value is derived from one or more rupee interest rates, prices of rupee interest rate instruments, or rupee inte
controls.control_description:
(xix) 'Interest Rate Derivative' means a financial derivative contract whose value is
derived from one or more Rupee interest rates, prices of Rupee interest rate
instruments, or Rupee interest rate indices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a financial derivative contract whose value is derived from one or more rupee interest rates, prices of rupee interest rate instruments, or rupee inte

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc derivative contract whose potential pay- out during the tenure of the contract can be more than the notional amount of the contract or whose pa
controls.control_description:
(xx) 'Leveraged derivative' means an OTC derivative contract whose potential pay-
out during the tenure of the contract can be more than the notional amount of the
contract or whose pay-out calculation involves effective multiplication, by a factor
of more than 1.0, of either the notional amount or the underlying interest rate /
price / index.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc derivative contract whose potential pay- out during the tenure of the contract can be more than the notional amount of the contract or whose pa

controls.control_objective: To ensure an entity which provides prices to users and other market-makers
controls.control_description:
(xxi) 'Market-maker' means an entity which provides prices to users and other
market-makers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an entity which provides prices to users and other market-makers

controls.control_objective: To ensure an interest rate future based on any rupee denominated money market interest rate or money market instrument
controls.control_description:
(xxii) 'Money Market Futures' means an interest rate future based on any rupee
denominated money market interest rate or money market instrument.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an interest rate future based on any rupee denominated money market interest rate or money market instrument

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning assigned to it in section 2(57) of the companies act, 2013, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
(xxiii) 'Net-worth' shall have the same meaning assigned to it in section 2(57) of the
Companies Act, 2013, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to it in section 2(57) of the companies act, 2013, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure and includes a 'person resident outside india' as defined in section 2 (w) of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 of 1999)
controls.control_description:
(xxiv) 'Non-resident' means and includes a 'person resident outside India' as defined
in section 2 (w) of Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (42 of 1999).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to and includes a 'person resident outside india' as defined in section 2 (w) of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 of 1999)

controls.control_objective: To ensure include those undertaken on electronic trading platforms (etps)
controls.control_description:
(xxv) 'Over-the-counter (OTC) market' refers to a market where derivative
transactions are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and shall
include those undertaken on electronic trading platforms (ETPs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include those undertaken on electronic trading platforms (etps)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956 (42 of 1956)
controls.control_description:
(xxvi) 'Recognised Stock Exchange' shall have the same meaning as assigned to
it in section 2(f) of the Securities Contract Regulation Act, 1956 (42 of 1956).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956 (42 of 1956)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under para-9 of indian accounting standard (ind as) 24 - related party disclosures or para-9 of international
controls.control_description:
(xxvii) 'Related Party' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Para-9 of
Indian Accounting Standard (Ind AS) 24 - Related Party Disclosures or Para-9
of International Accounting Standard (IAS) 24 - Related Party Disclosures or
any other equivalent accounting standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under para-9 of indian accounting standard (ind as) 24 - related party disclosures or para-9 of international

controls.control_objective: To ensure exclude associates, as specified in ind as 24 or ias 24 or any other equivalent accounting standard
controls.control_description:
Provided that the term 'related party'
shall exclude associates, as specified in Ind AS 24 or IAS 24 or any other
equivalent accounting standard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exclude associates, as specified in ind as 24 or ias 24 or any other equivalent accounting standard

controls.control_objective: To ensure and includes a 'person resident in india' as defined in section 2 (v) of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 of 1999)
controls.control_description:
(xxviii) 'Resident' means and includes a 'person resident in India' as defined in section
2 (v) of Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (42 of 1999).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to and includes a 'person resident in india' as defined in section 2 (v) of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 of 1999)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a derivative contract which involves simultaneous purchase of an interest rate floor and sale of an interest rate cap on the same interest rate for th
controls.control_description:
(xxix) 'Reverse interest rate collar' means a derivative contract which involves
simultaneous purchase of an interest rate floor and sale of an interest rate cap
on the same interest rate for the same maturity and notional principal amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a derivative contract which involves simultaneous purchase of an interest rate floor and sale of an interest rate cap on the same interest rate for th

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(91) of the companies act, 2013, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
(xxx) 'Turnover' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(91) of the
Companies Act, 2013, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(91) of the companies act, 2013, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or in foreign exchange management act (fema), 1999
controls.control_description:
2.2 Words and expressions, used but not defined in these Directions, shall have the
same meaning as assigned to them in the Act or in Foreign Exchange Management
Act (FEMA), 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or in foreign exchange management act (fema), 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake ird transactions through its central treasury or its group entity
controls.control_description:
3.2 A non-resident may undertake IRD transactions through its central treasury or its
group entity, where applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake ird transactions through its central treasury or its group entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the central treasury / group entity is appropriately authorised by the user to deal for and on its behalf
controls.control_description:
In case of such transactions, the market-maker
shall ensure that the central treasury / group entity is appropriately authorised by
the user to deal for and on its behalf.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the central treasury / group entity is appropriately authorised by the user to deal for and on its behalf

controls.control_objective: To ensure be finalised by the exchange
controls.control_description:
4.1 A recognised stock exchange is permitted to offer any standardised IRD product
and the product design, eligible participants and other details of the IRD product
may be finalised by the exchange.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be finalised by the exchange

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain prior approval of the reserve bank before introducing any new ird product or carrying out modifications to an existing product
controls.control_description:
The exchange shall obtain prior approval of the
Reserve Bank before introducing any new IRD product or carrying out
modifications to an existing product.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain prior approval of the reserve bank before introducing any new ird product or carrying out modifications to an existing product

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a benchmark published by an fba
controls.control_description:
4.2 Any floating interest rate or price or index used in an exchange-traded IRD shall
be a benchmark published by an FBA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a benchmark published by an fba

controls.control_objective: To ensure transact in exchange-traded irds for the purpose of hedging
controls.control_description: 4.3 A non-resident may transact in exchange-traded IRDs for the purpose of hedging.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transact in exchange-traded irds for the purpose of hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed ₹5,000 crore, aggregated across all irf instruments
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed ₹5,000 crore, aggregated across all irf instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed its consolidated long position in government securities and interest rate futures, at any point in time
controls.control_description:
(ii) The total gross short (sold) position of any FPI shall not exceed its
consolidated long position in Government securities and Interest Rate
Futures, at any point in time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed its consolidated long position in government securities and interest rate futures, at any point in time

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that users participating on the exchanges are made adequately aware of the risks associated with ird products
controls.control_description:
4.5 Recognised stock exchanges shall ensure that users participating on the
exchanges are made adequately aware of the risks associated with IRD products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that users participating on the exchanges are made adequately aware of the risks associated with ird products

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as prescribed by the securities and exchange board of india (sebi), in consultation with the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
4.6 The market timings for undertaking an exchange-traded IRD transaction shall be
as prescribed by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI), in
consultation with the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as prescribed by the securities and exchange board of india (sebi), in consultation with the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish returns, documents and other information relating to ird transactions to the reserve bank or any other agency as may be required by the reserv
controls.control_description:
4.7 Recognised stock exchanges shall furnish returns, documents and other
information relating to IRD transactions to the Reserve Bank or any other agency
as may be required by the Reserve Bank in the manner and format and within the
time frame as may be specified by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish returns, documents and other information relating to ird transactions to the reserve bank or any other agency as may be required by the reserv

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to have been granted under these directions
controls.control_description:
4.8 Any approval granted to a recognised stock exchange for introducing an IRD
product prior to the issuance of these Directions shall be deemed to have been
granted under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to have been granted under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated by making a gross addition, ignoring mathematical signs, of the pvbp of each non-resident
controls.control_description:
Interest Rate Derivatives in the OTC Market
Explanation: The PVBP cap shall be calculated by making a gross addition,
ignoring mathematical signs, of the PVBP of each non-resident.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated by making a gross addition, ignoring mathematical signs, of the pvbp of each non-resident

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer any ird/ fcs-ird to a non-resident for purposes other than hedging after the pvbp cap is reached
controls.control_description:
Market-makers shall not offer any IRD/ FCS-IRD to a non-resident for
purposes other than hedging after the PVBP cap is reached.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer any ird/ fcs-ird to a non-resident for purposes other than hedging after the pvbp cap is reached

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor and publish the utilisation of the pvbp limit on a daily basis
controls.control_description:
CCIL shall monitor and publish the utilisation of the PVBP limit on a daily
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to monitor and publish the utilisation of the pvbp limit on a daily basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure also publish the methodology for calculation of the pvbp limit
controls.control_description:
CCIL shall also publish the methodology for calculation of the PVBP
limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to also publish the methodology for calculation of the pvbp limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to act as market-makers in irds:
controls.control_description: (i) The following entities shall be eligible to act as market-makers in IRDs:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to act as market-makers in irds:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a market-maker or a central counterparty authorised by the reserve bank for the purpose
controls.control_description:
(ii) At least one of the parties to an interest rate derivative transaction shall be a
market-maker or a central counterparty authorised by the Reserve Bank for the
purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a market-maker or a central counterparty authorised by the reserve bank for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified by market-makers either as retail or non-retail for the purpose of offering interest rate derivative contracts
controls.control_description:
(i) A User shall be classified by market-makers either as retail or non-retail for the
purpose of offering interest rate derivative contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified by market-makers either as retail or non-retail for the purpose of offering interest rate derivative contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:
controls.control_description: (ii) The following shall be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as a retail user
controls.control_description:
(iii) Any user who is not eligible to be classified as a non-retail user shall be
classified as a retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as a retail user

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to request the market-maker to get classified as a retail user
controls.control_description:
(iv) Any user who is otherwise eligible to be classified as a non-retail user shall
have the option to request the market-maker to get classified as a retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to request the market-maker to get classified as a retail user

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer the following ird products to retail users:
controls.control_description: (i) A Market-maker may offer the following IRD products to retail users:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer the following ird products to retail users:

controls.control_objective: To ensure only buy these products
controls.control_description:
(c) European interest rate call and put option, subject to the condition that retail
user shall only buy these products;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only buy these products

controls.control_objective: To ensure only buy these products
controls.control_description:
(d) Interest rate cap and interest rate floor, subject to the condition that retail
user shall only buy these products;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only buy these products

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a net receiver of premium
controls.control_description:
(e) Interest rate collar and reverse interest rate collar, subject to the condition
that the retail user shall not be a net receiver of premium.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a net receiver of premium

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer the following ird products to non-retail users including users classified as non-retail in terms of para 5
controls.control_description:
(ii) A Market-maker may offer the following IRD products to non-retail users
including users classified as non-retail in terms of Para 5.2 (ii)(i) of these
Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer the following ird products to non-retail users including users classified as non-retail in terms of para 5

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer fcs-ird contracts to non-residents
controls.control_description:
(iii) A bank having an Authorised Dealer Category-I (AD Cat-I) license under FEMA,
1999, and an SPD authorized under section 10(1) of FEMA,1999, may offer
FCS-IRD contracts to non-residents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer fcs-ird contracts to non-residents

controls.control_objective: To ensure also undertake transactions in fcs-ird among themselves
controls.control_description:
These market-makers may also undertake
transactions in FCS-IRD among themselves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also undertake transactions in fcs-ird among themselves

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer transactions in irds based on the modified mumbai interbank forward outright rate (mmifor) to users
controls.control_description:
(iv) Scheduled Commercial Banks and SPDs authorised under section 10(1) of
FEMA,1999, may offer transactions in IRDs based on the Modified Mumbai
Interbank Forward Outright Rate (MMIFOR) to users.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer transactions in irds based on the modified mumbai interbank forward outright rate (mmifor) to users

controls.control_objective: To ensure also undertake transactions in irds based on the mmifor among themselves
controls.control_description:
These market-makers
may also undertake transactions in IRDs based on the MMIFOR among
themselves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also undertake transactions in irds based on the mmifor among themselves

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to provisions specified in terms of para 5
controls.control_description:
(v) The IRD products that can be offered by a market-maker to a non-resident shall
be subject to provisions specified in terms of para 5.4(iii) of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to provisions specified in terms of para 5

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer ird products to a resident retail user (including a user who chooses to be classified as a retail user in terms of para 5
controls.control_description:
(i) A market-maker shall offer IRD products to a resident retail user (including a
user who chooses to be classified as a retail user in terms of Para 5.2(iv) of
these Directions) and to a resident user classified as non-retail user in terms of
Para 5.2(ii)(i) of these Directions, only for the purpose of hedging.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer ird products to a resident retail user (including a user who chooses to be classified as a retail user in terms of para 5

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer ird products to a resident non-retail user other than a user who is classified as a non-retail user in terms of para 5
controls.control_description:
(ii) A market-maker may offer IRD products to a resident non-retail user other than
a user who is classified as a non-retail user in terms of Para 5.2(ii)(i) of these
Directions without any restriction in terms of purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer ird products to a resident non-retail user other than a user who is classified as a non-retail user in terms of para 5

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer an ird contract on government securities to a non-resident only for the purpose of hedging
controls.control_description:
Provided that market-makers shall offer an IRD contract on Government
Securities to a non-resident only for the purpose of hedging.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer an ird contract on government securities to a non-resident only for the purpose of hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer ird products based on mmifor to users only for the purpose of hedging
controls.control_description:
(iv) A market-maker shall offer IRD products based on MMIFOR to users only for
the purpose of hedging.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer ird products based on mmifor to users only for the purpose of hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake ird transactions, including fcs-ird transactions with a non-resident directly or by way of a back-to-back arrangement for the purpose of hedging interest rate risk or otherwise
controls.control_description:
(a) A market-maker may undertake IRD transactions, including FCS-IRD
transactions with a non-resident directly or by way of a back-to-back
arrangement for the purpose of hedging interest rate risk or otherwise, subject to
the following:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake ird transactions, including fcs-ird transactions with a non-resident directly or by way of a back-to-back arrangement for the purpose of hedging interest rate risk or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure the overseas entity is eligible to deal with derivatives in the capacity of a dealer / market-maker as per the host jurisdiction laws and regulations
controls.control_description:
The back-to-back arrangement may be put in place through an overseas
entity (including overseas branches, IFSC Banking Units (IBUs), wholly
owned subsidiaries or joint ventures of market-makers) provided that the
overseas entity is eligible to deal with derivatives in the capacity of a dealer /
market-maker as per the host jurisdiction laws and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the overseas entity is eligible to deal with derivatives in the capacity of a dealer / market-maker as per the host jurisdiction laws and regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake such transactions provided the wholly owned subsidiary / joint venture is a banking entity
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake such transactions provided the wholly owned subsidiary / joint venture is a banking entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported individually by either the market- maker in india or its related party(ies) to the trade repository (tr) of clearing corporation of india
controls.control_description:
IRD transactions undertaken globally by the offshore related parties of the
market-maker in India shall be reported individually by either the market-
maker in India or its related party(ies) to the Trade Repository (TR) of
Clearing Corporation of India Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported individually by either the market- maker in india or its related party(ies) to the trade repository (tr) of clearing corporation of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide information regarding ird transactions, including fcs-ird transactions, undertaken through the overseas entity (including overseas branches, i
controls.control_description:
The market-maker shall provide information regarding IRD transactions,
including FCS-IRD transactions, undertaken through the overseas entity
(including overseas branches, IBUs, wholly owned subsidiaries and joint
ventures of the market-makers), as may be required by the Reserve Bank in
the prescribed manner and time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide information regarding ird transactions, including fcs-ird transactions, undertaken through the overseas entity (including overseas branches, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to an overall limit, as specified below: i
controls.control_description:
(b) IRD transactions, including transactions in FCS-IRD, by non-residents with
market-makers undertaken for purposes other than hedging, shall be subject to
an overall limit, as specified below:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be subject to an overall limit, as specified below: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the amount of ₹1,000 crore (pvbp cap)
controls.control_description:
The Price Value of a Basis Point (PVBP) of all outstanding IRD positions,
including FCS-IRD positions shall not exceed the amount of ₹1,000 crore
(PVBP cap).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed the amount of ₹1,000 crore (pvbp cap)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a benchmark published by an fba
controls.control_description:
(i) Any floating interest rate or price or index used in IRDs in OTC markets shall
be a benchmark published by an FBA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a benchmark published by an fba

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the broker has been accredited by the fixed income money market and derivatives association of india (fimmda) for the purpose
controls.control_description:
(ii) A market-maker undertaking an IRD transaction through a broker shall ensure
that the broker has been accredited by the Fixed Income Money Market and
Derivatives Association of India (FIMMDA) for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the broker has been accredited by the fixed income money market and derivatives association of india (fimmda) for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled bilaterally or through any clearing arrangement approved by the reserve bank for the purpose
controls.control_description:
(iii) An IRD transaction shall be settled bilaterally or through any clearing
arrangement approved by the Reserve Bank for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled bilaterally or through any clearing arrangement approved by the reserve bank for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be settled as decided bilaterally by the counterparties
controls.control_description:
An FCS-IRD
transaction may also be settled as decided bilaterally by the counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be settled as decided bilaterally by the counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure exit its position in irds by unwinding the position with the original counterparty or assigning the position to any other eligible market participant(
controls.control_description:
(iv) A market participant may exit its position in IRDs by unwinding the position with
the original counterparty or assigning the position to any other eligible market
participant(s) through novation1 subject to the provisions of the circular on
Novation of OTC Derivative Contracts dated December 9, 2013, issued vide
Notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exit its position in irds by unwinding the position with the original counterparty or assigning the position to any other eligible market participant(

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a market-maker
controls.control_description:
DBOD.No.BP.BC.76/21.04.157/2013-14 and subject to the
condition that at least one of the parties to the novated interest rate derivative
transaction shall be a market-maker .
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a market-maker

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to ird transactions undertaken in terms of these directions
controls.control_description:
However, provisions under Paragraph 2,
Paragraph 5.1 and Paragraph 5.2 of the above circular shall not apply to IRD
transactions undertaken in terms of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to ird transactions undertaken in terms of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by fimmda
controls.control_description:
(v) Settlement basis and other market conventions for IRD transactions may be
specified by FIMMDA, where possible, in consultation with market participants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by fimmda

controls.control_objective: To ensure be from 9:00 am to 5:00 pm on each business day or as specified by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
(vi) Market hours for IRD transactions in OTC market shall be from 9:00 AM to 5:00
PM on each business day or as specified by the Reserve Bank from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be from 9:00 am to 5:00 pm on each business day or as specified by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake fcs-ird transactions beyond onshore market hours
controls.control_description:
A market-maker may undertake FCS-IRD transactions beyond onshore
market hours.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake fcs-ird transactions beyond onshore market hours

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the master direction - reserve bank of india (market-makers in otc derivatives) directions, 2021 [notification no
controls.control_description:
(vii) A market-maker shall comply with the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Market-makers in OTC Derivatives) Directions, 2021 [Notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the master direction - reserve bank of india (market-makers in otc derivatives) directions, 2021 [notification no

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the reserve bank of india (prevention of market abuse) directions, 2019 issued vide rbi circular no
controls.control_description:
(viii) A market participant shall comply with the Reserve Bank of India (Prevention
of Market Abuse) Directions, 2019 issued vide RBI Circular No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the reserve bank of india (prevention of market abuse) directions, 2019 issued vide rbi circular no

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for such documents from users as it deems necessary for complying with the requirements of these directions
controls.control_description:
(ix) A market-maker may call for such documents from users as it deems necessary
for complying with the requirements of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to call for such documents from users as it deems necessary for complying with the requirements of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all otc ird transactions undertaken by it directly or through its overseas entities (including overseas branches, ibus, wholly owned subsidiari
controls.control_description:
(i) A market-maker shall report all OTC IRD transactions undertaken by it directly
or through its overseas entities (including overseas branches, IBUs, wholly
owned subsidiaries or joint ventures of market-makers) to the TR of CCIL as
per the following timelines:
I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report all otc ird transactions undertaken by it directly or through its overseas entities (including overseas branches, ibus, wholly owned subsidiari

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported within 30 minutes of the transactions
controls.control_description:
All IRD transactions (including client trades) undertaken by a market-maker,
other than FCS-IRD transactions with non-residents and structured
derivative transactions, shall be reported within 30 minutes of the
transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported within 30 minutes of the transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported before 12:00 noon of the following business day
controls.control_description:
All FCS-IRD transactions undertaken by a market-maker with non-
residents, either directly or by way of a back-to-back arrangement shall be
reported before 12:00 noon of the following business day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported before 12:00 noon of the following business day

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported before closure of the tr of ccil for the day
controls.control_description:
All structured derivative transactions undertaken by a market-maker during
the day shall be reported before closure of the TR of CCIL for the day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported before closure of the tr of ccil for the day

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the applicable prudential norms including those related to capital adequacy, exposure norms, related party transactions, kyc/aml requirements
controls.control_description:
(i) Market participants shall follow the applicable prudential norms including those
related to capital adequacy, exposure norms, related party transactions, KYC/AML
requirements, etc., issued by their respective regulators for IRD transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the applicable prudential norms including those related to capital adequacy, exposure norms, related party transactions, kyc/aml requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per notified and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory guidelines/instructions issued by the respective regulators
controls.control_description:
(ii) The accounting of IRD transactions by market participants shall be as per notified
and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory guidelines/instructions
issued by the respective regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per notified and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory guidelines/instructions issued by the respective regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed in this regard
controls.control_description:
In case the notified applicable accounting
standards or the respective regulator have not prescribed the accounting treatment for
IRD contracts, guidance, if any, issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of
India shall be followed in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such information, statement or clarification within such time as specified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Obligation to provide information sought by the Reserve Bank: The Reserve
Bank may call for information or statement or seek any clarification, which in the
opinion of the Reserve Bank is necessary, from persons or agencies dealing in IRD
transactions, including eligible participants, ETP operators and exchanges, and such
persons/agencies shall furnish such information, statement or clarification within such
time as specified by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such information, statement or clarification within such time as specified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in public interest, publish any anonymized data related to transactions in the ird market
controls.control_description:
Dissemination of data: The Reserve Bank or any other agency authorised by it,
may, in public interest, publish any anonymized data related to transactions in the IRD
market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in public interest, publish any anonymized data related to transactions in the ird market

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person from participating in the ird markets for a period
controls.control_description:
Violation of Directions: If a person violates any provision of these Directions, the
Reserve Bank may, in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance
with law, disallow that person from participating in the IRD markets for a period not
exceeding one month at a time, after providing reasonable opportunity of hearing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person from participating in the ird markets for a period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made public by the reserve bank
controls.control_description: Such action may be made public by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made public by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to ird transactions entered into from the date the directions come into effect
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to IRD transactions entered into from the date the
Directions come into effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to ird transactions entered into from the date the directions come into effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure 20, 2005 b
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 20, 2005 b

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the necessary details of the offshore rupee ird transactions undertaken by its offshore related parties to the trade repository (tr) of ccil
controls.control_description:
Reporting entity: The market-maker shall report the necessary details of the
offshore Rupee IRD transactions undertaken by its offshore related parties to
the Trade Repository (TR) of CCIL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the necessary details of the offshore rupee ird transactions undertaken by its offshore related parties to the trade repository (tr) of ccil

controls.control_objective: To ensure also choose to report the details of the rupee ird transactions undertaken by it independently to the tr of ccil
controls.control_description:
The related entity of the market-maker may
also choose to report the details of the Rupee IRD transactions undertaken by
it independently to the TR of CCIL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also choose to report the details of the rupee ird transactions undertaken by it independently to the tr of ccil

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the tr
controls.control_description:
Coverage of transactions: All Rupee IRD transactions, undertaken globally
by the related parties of the market-maker in India shall be reported to the TR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the tr

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all transactions undertaken by its offshore related parties are reported
controls.control_description:
Reporting requirements: A market-maker shall ensure that all transactions
undertaken by its offshore related parties are reported.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all transactions undertaken by its offshore related parties are reported

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following requirements:
controls.control_description:
With a view to providing
operational flexibility, such reporting shall be subject to the following
requirements:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following requirements:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option of not reporting transactions where the gross notional of the contract does not exceed us $ 1 million or equivalent
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option of not reporting transactions where the gross notional of the contract does not exceed us $ 1 million or equivalent

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that with effect from january 01, 2027, transactions reported by it constitute at least 80 per cent of the gross notional value of all ird tran
controls.control_description:
(iii) A market-maker shall ensure that with effect from January 01, 2027,
transactions reported by it constitute at least 80 per cent of the gross
notional value of all IRD transactions, undertaken offshore by offshore
related parties;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that with effect from january 01, 2027, transactions reported by it constitute at least 80 per cent of the gross notional value of all ird tran

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that with effect from january 01, 2028, transactions reported by it constitute at least 90 per cent of the gross notional value of all ird tran
controls.control_description:
(iv) A market-maker shall ensure that with effect from January 01, 2028,
transactions reported by it constitute at least 90 per cent of the gross
notional value of all IRD transactions, undertaken offshore by the market
maker and its related parties;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that with effect from january 01, 2028, transactions reported by it constitute at least 90 per cent of the gross notional value of all ird tran

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded
controls.control_description:
(v) For the purpose of computation of reporting requirement, financial
transactions indicated at (i) and (ii) above may be excluded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all elements of covered transactions which are relevant to provide meaningful ii information about the financial transaction
controls.control_description:
Details of transactions to be reported: A market-maker shall report all
elements of covered transactions which are relevant to provide meaningful
ii
information about the financial transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report all elements of covered transactions which are relevant to provide meaningful ii information about the financial transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported as the counterparty only in cases where the financial transaction is undertaken on an anonymous trading platform and is cleared by the cen
controls.control_description:
The central counterparty
may be reported as the counterparty only in cases where the financial
transaction is undertaken on an anonymous trading platform and is cleared by
the central counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported as the counterparty only in cases where the financial transaction is undertaken on an anonymous trading platform and is cleared by the cen

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as indicated by ccil with the prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
The reporting formats shall be as indicated by CCIL
with the prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as indicated by ccil with the prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported preferably on the date of transaction, but in any case within two working days from the date of transaction
controls.control_description:
Cut-off time for reporting: Transaction shall be reported preferably on the
date of transaction, but in any case within two working days from the date of
transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported preferably on the date of transaction, but in any case within two working days from the date of transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in terms of the reserve bank of india (standalone primary dealers) directions, 2025, dated november 28, 2025, issued by the department of regulatio
controls.control_description:
Reporting by SPD
The reporting by related parties of SPDs to the TR shall be in terms of the Reserve
Bank of India (Standalone Primary Dealers) Directions, 2025, dated November 28,
2025, issued by the Department of Regulation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in terms of the reserve bank of india (standalone primary dealers) directions, 2025, dated november 28, 2025, issued by the department of regulatio
